TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi abstract sealed beforefieldinit WorkflowAgentExtensions extends System.Object

Docs.summary: Provides extension methods for running workflow-based AI agents in the agent server framework.

MemberSignature.Value: public static System.Threading.Tasks.Task RunWorkflowAgentAsync (this Azure.AI.AgentServer.AgentFramework.WorkflowAgentFactory workflowAgentFactory, Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory? loggerFactory = default, string telemetrySourceName = "Agents", Azure.AI.AgentServer.AgentFramework.Persistence.IAgentThreadRepository? threadRepository = default);

.method public static hidebysig class System.Threading.Tasks.Task RunWorkflowAgentAsync(class Azure.AI.AgentServer.AgentFramework.WorkflowAgentFactory workflowAgentFactory, class Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory loggerFactory, string telemetrySourceName, class Azure.AI.AgentServer.AgentFramework.Persistence.IAgentThreadRepository threadRepository) cil managed

<Extension()> Public Function RunWorkflowAgentAsync (workflowAgentFactory As WorkflowAgentFactory, Optional loggerFactory As ILoggerFactory = Nothing, Optional telemetrySourceName As String = "Agents", Optional threadRepository As IAgentThreadRepository = Nothing) As Task

Docs.param: Optional logger factory for creating loggers.
The name of the telemetry source. Defaults to "Agents".
Optional thread repository for managing agent threads
Docs.summary: Runs a workflow-based AI agent asynchronously using the provided service provider.
Docs.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation.

MemberSignature.Value: public static System.Threading.Tasks.Task RunWorkflowAgentAsync (this Azure.AI.AgentServer.AgentFramework.WorkflowAgentFactory workflowAgentFactory, IServiceProvider sp, string telemetrySourceName = "Agents", Azure.AI.AgentServer.AgentFramework.Persistence.IAgentThreadRepository? threadRepository = default);

<Extension()> Public Function RunWorkflowAgentAsync (workflowAgentFactory As WorkflowAgentFactory, sp As IServiceProvider, Optional telemetrySourceName As String = "Agents", Optional threadRepository As IAgentThreadRepository = Nothing) As Task

static member RunWorkflowAgentAsync : Azure.AI.AgentServer.AgentFramework.WorkflowAgentFactory * IServiceProvider * string * Azure.AI.AgentServer.AgentFramework.Persistence.IAgentThreadRepository -> System.Threading.Tasks.Task

Docs.param: Optional thread repository for managing agent threads
Docs.summary: Runs a workflow-based AI agent asynchronously using the provided service provider.
Docs.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

MemberSignature.Value: public static System.Threading.Tasks.Task RunWorkflowAgentAsync (this IServiceProvider sp, Azure.AI.AgentServer.AgentFramework.WorkflowAgentFactory? workflowAgentFactory = default, string telemetrySourceName = "Agents", Azure.AI.AgentServer.AgentFramework.Persistence.IAgentThreadRepository? threadRepository = default);

.method public static hidebysig class System.Threading.Tasks.Task RunWorkflowAgentAsync(class System.IServiceProvider sp, class Azure.AI.AgentServer.AgentFramework.WorkflowAgentFactory workflowAgentFactory, string telemetrySourceName, class Azure.AI.AgentServer.AgentFramework.Persistence.IAgentThreadRepository threadRepository) cil managed

<Extension()> Public Function RunWorkflowAgentAsync (sp As IServiceProvider, Optional workflowAgentFactory As WorkflowAgentFactory = Nothing, Optional telemetrySourceName As String = "Agents", Optional threadRepository As IAgentThreadRepository = Nothing) As Task

static member RunWorkflowAgentAsync : IServiceProvider * Azure.AI.AgentServer.AgentFramework.WorkflowAgentFactory * string * Azure.AI.AgentServer.AgentFramework.Persistence.IAgentThreadRepository -> System.Threading.Tasks.Task

Docs.param: The service provider for dependency injection.
Optional IWorkflowAgentFactory. If null, retrieves from service provider.
The name of the telemetry source. Defaults to "Agents".
Optional thread repository for managing agent threads
Docs.summary: Runs a workflow-based AI agent asynchronously using the provided service provider.
Docs.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation.

MemberSignature.Value: public static System.Threading.Tasks.Task RunWorkflowAgentAsync (this Azure.AI.AgentServer.AgentFramework.WorkflowAgentFactory workflowAgentFactory, Azure.Core.TokenCredential credential, Uri? projectEndpoint = default, Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory? loggerFactory = default, string telemetrySourceName = "Agents", Azure.AI.AgentServer.AgentFramework.Persistence.IAgentThreadRepository? threadRepository = default);

.method public static hidebysig class System.Threading.Tasks.Task RunWorkflowAgentAsync(class Azure.AI.AgentServer.AgentFramework.WorkflowAgentFactory workflowAgentFactory, class Azure.Core.TokenCredential credential, class System.Uri projectEndpoint, class Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory loggerFactory, string telemetrySourceName, class Azure.AI.AgentServer.AgentFramework.Persistence.IAgentThreadRepository threadRepository) cil managed

<Extension()> Public Function RunWorkflowAgentAsync (workflowAgentFactory As WorkflowAgentFactory, credential As TokenCredential, Optional projectEndpoint As Uri = Nothing, Optional loggerFactory As ILoggerFactory = Nothing, Optional telemetrySourceName As String = "Agents", Optional threadRepository As IAgentThreadRepository = Nothing) As Task

static member RunWorkflowAgentAsync : Azure.AI.AgentServer.AgentFramework.WorkflowAgentFactory * Azure.Core.TokenCredential * Uri * Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory * string * Azure.AI.AgentServer.AgentFramework.Persistence.IAgentThreadRepository -> System.Threading.Tasks.Task

Docs.param: The token credential used to access Foundry conversations.
Optional Foundry project endpoint. Defaults to AZURE_AI_PROJECT_ENDPOINT.
Optional logger factory for creating loggers.
Optional thread repository. When provided, it overrides auto-hydration repository creation.
Docs.summary: Runs a workflow-based AI agent asynchronously with Foundry-backed conversation history hydration.
Docs.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.
